title: Add AI summarize tool for use in multi-step plans
goal: AI가 멀티스텝 계획에서 '요약해줘' 스텝을 만들 수 있도록 summarize tool을 추가한다. 이전 스텝의 텍스트를 받아 AI로 요약하여 반환한다. 동적 파라미터(${steps[N].result.data.text})와 함께 사용된다.

test_requirements.case: summarize tool with text param returns summary
summarize tool without text param returns error
summarize tool without API key uses extractive fallback
test_requirements.expected: success=True, data.summary contains first few sentences of input

test_requirements.case: summarize tool with language param respects language
summarize tool truncates very long input
test_requirements.expected: input over 10000 chars is truncated before sending to AI

constraints: Params: {text: string (required), language?: string (optional, default: auto-detect), max_length?: int (optional, default: 200)}
Return: {success: true, data: {summary: string, language: string}}
If no API key: extractive fallback — return first 3 sentences of input
Use existing ai/runtime.py get_client() and has_api_key()
Do not modify ai/summarizer.py — this is a separate tool for use in plans
Do not modify any existing tools
test_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
